ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "state" INTEGER /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "case_number" INTEGER /* Case number assigned to the incident */,
  "vehicle_number" INTEGER /* Vehicle number involved in the incident */,
  "pve_forms" INTEGER /* PVE forms related to the incident */,
  "number_of_occupants" INTEGER /* Number of occupants in the vehicle */,
  "incident_day" INTEGER /* Day of the month the incident occurred */,
  "incident_month" INTEGER /* Month of the incident */,
  "incident_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the incident */,
  "incident_minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the incident */,
  "harm_event" INTEGER /* Harmful event indicator */,
  "man_collusion" INTEGER /* Collusion indicator */,
  "incident_type" INTEGER /* Type of incident (e.g., accident, collision) */,
  "hit_run" INTEGER /* Hit and run indicator */,
  "reg_status" INTEGER /* Registration status of the vehicle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Owner ID of the vehicle */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "location_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "location_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "light_conditions" TEXT /* Light conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "incident_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency responsible for recording the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_vehicle_number FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_number") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES recording_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Manufacturing year of the vehicle */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle identification number (VIN) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of the incident */,
  "insurance_company" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Owner ID of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the owner */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number of the owner */,
  "license_state" TEXT /* State where the driver's license was issued */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazardous_materials" (
  "hazard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazardous material entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident ID */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of hazardous material */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of hazardous material involved */,
  "hazardous_indicator" INTEGER /* Indicator if the material is hazardous */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the hazardous material */,
  "container_type" TEXT /* Type of container used for the hazardous material */,
  "handling_instructions" TEXT /* Handling instructions for the hazardous material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hazard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazardous_materials_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type (e.g., accident, collision) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the incident type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level associated with the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collision_data" (
  "collision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collision record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident ID */,
  "collision_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the collision */,
  "collision_location" TEXT /* Location where the collision occurred */,
  "collision_speed" REAL /* Speed of the collision */,
  "collision_angle" REAL /* Angle of collision */,
  "number_of_vehicles_involved" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the collision */,
  "collision_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the collision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collision_data_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impacts" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident ID */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., front, rear) */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the impact */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the impact */,
  "impact_speed" REAL /* Speed at the time of impact */,
  "impact_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impacts_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident ID */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who generated the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_reports_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recording_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the agency */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction covered by the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)
